mapper.sql: post_id, author_id, category_id, original_language, status, cover_image_url, featured, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, view_count, hot_score, created_time, updated_time

p.post_id, p.author_id, p.category_id, p.original_language, p.status, p.cover_image_url, p.featured, p.like_count, p.favorite_count, p.comment_count, p.view_count, p.hot_score, p.created_time, p.updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(pi.title, '') FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_i18n pi ON pi.post_id = p.post_id AND pi.language_code = p.original_language WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM posts WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY featured DESC, hot_score DESC, updated_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM posts p
JOIN categories c ON c.category_id = p.category_id
WHERE p.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND c.category_code = #{categoryCode}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM post_i18n pi WHERE pi.post_id = p.post_id AND ( pi.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pi.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pi.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )
ORDER BY p.created_time DESC, p.post_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM post_favorites f JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = f.post_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY f.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM post_view_history h JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = h.post_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY h.view_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( author_id, category_id, original_language, status, cover_image_url, featured, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, view_count, hot_score ) VALUES ( #{authorId}, #{categoryId}, #{originalLanguage}, #{status}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{featured}, #{likeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{commentCount}, #{viewCount}, #{hotScore} )
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET category_id = #{categoryId}, original_language = #{originalLanguage}, status = #{status}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, featured = #{featured}, like_count = #{likeCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, view_count = #{viewCount}, hot_score = #{hotScore} WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET like_count = GREATEST(0, like_count + #{delta}), hot_score = GREATEST(0, hot_score + (#{delta} * 2)) WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET favorite_count = GREATEST(0, favorite_count + #{delta}), hot_score = GREATEST(0, hot_score + (#{delta} * 3)) WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(0, comment_count + #{delta}), hot_score = GREATEST(0, hot_score + (#{delta} * 4)) WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1, hot_score = hot_score + 0.25 WHERE post_id = #{postId}
